title: 10076_Probabilistic_Inference_in_Language_Models_via_Twisted_Sequential_Monte_Carlo
positive_examples: Improves safety through better steering of generation to human preferences
Ability to estimate or bound probabilities of rare behaviors
negative_examples: Techniques could be repurposed for generating samples from a harmful distribution of text
Magnifies harms in the hands of malevolent users who have access to model weights
